creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've updated the port jp-camltk41-1.0 (japanese/camltk41).

	Current modifications is

		(1) Change slave to x11/camtk41.

	Delete and Update files are respecively

	[Delete] :
		files/		(Whole directory)
		files/md5
		patches
		patches/patch-aa
		patches/patch-ab
		pkg/		(Whole directory)
		pkg/COMMENT
		pkg/DESCR
		pkg/PLIST

	[Update] :
		Makefile

	I put the diff from ports-current(japanese/camltk41) in "Fix:".
